summary: Acceptance Surface Modeling stays in packaged Skills, protocol, README, AGENTS, and asset tests while CLI remains deterministic state storage rather than a subjective AC validator.
fit: Aligned with the confirmed TypeScript agent state CLI baseline: packaged Skills own subjective product-surface modeling; CLI only stores state, reports evidence, and validates objective structure.

next: Use this apply record as architecture context when recording Product AC evidence.
